description:
V, 29. Accounts in the hand of Abū Zikrī Kohen. Mentions the purchase of two silk cushions for 364 dinars (!?). On verso there is an order of payment (see separate record). 

In his notecard (see attached), Goitein copied the shelfmark in one place as T-S NS 38.11, but that is incorrect.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
